title: HsmSha finalize_into: undocumented silent-zeros on HSM error
description: HsmSha256/384/512::finalize_into zeroes the output buffer and calls log::error\! when the HSM call fails, but this behavior is completely undocumented. The digest::FixedOutput trait cannot propagate errors, so callers have no way to detect failure. A caller that checks the output for a known-bad value (all zeros) would need to know to do this. Fix: add explicit doc to each HsmSha* struct saying 'If the HSM call fails, finalize_into writes all-zero bytes to the output and emits a log::error\! entry. There is no other signal.'
